name: Tianjin LVYIN Landscape and Ecology Construction Co., Ltd
summary: Tianjin LVYIN Landscape and Ecology Construction Co., Ltd engages in ecological restoration and landscaping construction business in China. The company offers construction services for ecological restoration works, municipal gardens, and real estate landscape projects; landscape engineering service; saline and alkali restoration, soil and water conservation, and water environment management; and landscape design, technology research, and development services. It also engages in the production of seedlings. The company was founded in 1998 and is based in Tianjin, China.
